negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The exact 0x0808 agent-call fee path is absent: Phase 1 calculate_async_fees does not accept 0x0808, the generic Phase 2 helper rejects it as unsupported, and builder/verifier special-case only SOVEREIGN_AGENT_PRECOMPILE at 0x080C.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs implements work-based Phase 2 fees for sovereign-agent delivery metrics.
crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs and crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs extract sovereign-agent metrics and call calculate_agent_fees_phase2_work.

notes: Confirmed gap against the exact invariant: related work-based pricing exists, but the specified 0x0808 agent-call fee path is missing.
rationale: The diff adds agent pricing constants and functions, routes Phase 1 calculate_async_fees for 0x0808 to calculate_agent_fees_phase1, makes calculate_async_fees_phase2 reject 0x0808, and adds builder/verifier paths that extract iterations/tool_calls from delivery results and call calculate_agent_fees_phase2_work. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Agent-call Phase 1 fees must use a constant executor settlement fee plus normal async commitment and inclusion fees, while Agent-call Phase 2 fees must be computed from actual delivered work as iterations * AGENT_ITERATION_FEE_WEI plus tool_calls * AGENT_TOOL_CALL_FEE_WEI with zero commitment and inclusion fees; generic polling-based Phase 2 pricing must reject 0x0808.
suggested_falsification_tests: For a 0x0808 Phase 1 commitment, assert calculate_async_fees returns the configured agent Phase 1 executor fee plus commitment/inclusion fees; for Phase 2, encode a delivery result with known iterations and tool_calls and assert both payload builder and block verifier expect exactly iterations*AGENT_ITERATION_FEE_WEI + tool_calls*AGENT_TOOL_CALL_FEE_WEI and reject malformed metrics or calls to calculate_async_fees_phase2 with 0x0808.
summary: Work-based agent fee logic exists only for the renamed sovereign-agent path, not 0x0808.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call calculate_async_fees for precompile 0x0808 and expect agent Phase 1 fees; current code returns unsupported. Also verify payload/verifier only special-case 0x080C.
title: Agent fees are work-based in Phase 2
